tr.td: Influenza virus A RNA [Presence] in Respiratory system specimen by NAA with probe detection
Influenza virus B RNA [Presence] in Respiratory system specimen by NAA with probe detection
Respiratory syncytial virus RNA [Presence] in Respiratory system specimen by NAA with probe detection
Parainfluenza virus 1 RNA [Presence] in Respiratory system specimen by NAA with probe detection
Parainfluenza virus 2 RNA [Presence] in Respiratory system specimen by NAA with probe detection
Parainfluenza virus 3 RNA [Presence] in Respiratory system specimen by NAA with probe detection
Rhinovirus RNA [Presence] in Respiratory system specimen by NAA with probe detection
Human metapneumovirus RNA [Presence] in Respiratory system specimen by NAA with probe detection
Adenovirus A+B+C+D+E DNA [Presence] in Respiratory system specimen by NAA with probe detection

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All tested respiratory viruses (influenza A/B, RSV, parainfluenza 1-3, rhinovirus, human metapneumovirus, adenovirus) were not detected in the respiratory specimen. These results suggest no evidence of acute infection with these common respiratory viruses at the time of sampling.
Influenza virus A RNA [Presence] in Respiratory system specimen by NAA with probe detection
